# Learning Goal: Attention

## Target

Understand the attention mechanism well enough to explain scaled dot-product attention, multi-head attention, and why self-attention replaces recurrence in the Transformer.

## Scope

**In scope:** scaled dot-product attention, multi-head attention, self-attention, positional encoding.
**Out of scope:** RLHF, diffusion models, efficient-attention kernels (FlashAttention).

## Subgoals

- [ ] Understand scaled dot-product and multi-head attention
- [ ] Understand positional encoding and its limitations
